LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF PAULA TRUST, ALAN STEUER, STAFFORD SMILEY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 11, 2018 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. THE CONTINUANCE IS NEEDED DUE TO THE LARGE NUMBER OF MOTIONS ON CALENDAR THIS WEEK AND THE LACK OF COURT RESOURCES TO PROPERLY RESOLVE ALL THE MOTIONS. BECAUSE THE TRIAL IS NOT TILL SEPTEMBER 2018, THE COURT HOPES THAT THE PARTIES WILL NOT BE TOO INCONVENIENCED BY THE CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR# 7489, MGHENO@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edwin P. Antolin, Esq. of Antolin Agarwal LLP, T:925.262.4187, for plaintiff/moving party;
Heather Brae Hoesterey, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T:415.703.5506, for defendant/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested; the matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS PAULA TRUST, ALAN STEUER and STAFFORD SMILEY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order that complies with CCP 437c(g) and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Continued To Jan-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAULA TRUST, ALAN STEUER, STAFFORD SMILEY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication is Continued on the court's own motion to January 11, 2018. The continuance is needed due to the large number of motions on calendar this week and the lack of court resources to properly resolve all the motions. Because the trial is not till September 2018, the court hopes that the parties will not be too inconvenienced by the continuance.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
